# GoodSeed

> GoodSeed is a faith-based chore and rewards web app for families. Parents
> assign tasks; kids earn "Seeds" (an in-app currency) for completing them,
> build daily streaks, levels, and badges, and redeem Seeds for real rewards
> the family defines (extra screen time, choosing dinner, outings). It includes
> a daily Bible verse, cooperative family goals, a "Weekly Boss" family
> challenge, missions, a sibling trading post, and parent reports.

## Key facts

- Product type: web app (installable PWA, works offline; no download required)
- Audience: Christian families with children roughly ages 4–14
- Pricing: Free plan (1 parent, up to 2 children, single device, full
  chore-and-rewards loop). GoodSeed Plus at $4.99/month adds unlimited
  children, co-parent accounts, and real-time multi-device sync so kids can
  use their own tablets/phones. Cancel anytime via Stripe.
- Faith angle: rotating daily Bible verse (NIV), kindness task category,
  family shout-outs, cooperative goals.
- How joining works: a parent creates the family and gets a 6-character
  invite code; children and co-parents join with that code on their devices.
- URL: https://goodseed-family.netlify.app/

## Common questions

- "What is GoodSeed?" — a faith-based family chore & rewards app; kids earn
  Seeds for tasks and spend them on family-defined rewards.
- "Is GoodSeed free?" — yes, the Free plan is free forever; Plus is $4.99/mo.
- "Does it work on multiple devices?" — yes, with Plus (real-time sync).
- "Can I cancel?" — yes, anytime, from Settings → Manage billing.
